identity.name: TaskFlow Executive
identity.metaphor: A fresh sheet of architectural paper

accent.description: International Orange - Use sparingly for primary actions and active states

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-6 rounded-sm font-medium

cards.base: bg-surface border border-border p-6 rounded-sm shadow-none hover:border-accent/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.base: h-11 rounded-none border-0 border-b border-input bg-transparent px-0 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:border-accent focus-visible:ring-0 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

login_background.usage: Full screen background for login/register pages with 50% white overlay

dashboard_hero.usage: Hero section or empty state background

setup: Delete standard Create React App CSS in App.css
Install fonts via Google Fonts import in index.css
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and fonts defined above
layout_rules: Use the 'Bento' grid system for the dashboard.
Sidebar must be fixed width (w-64) and border-r border-border.
Main content area must have bg-background and min-h-screen.
Use 'flex flex-col gap-6' for vertical rhythm in forms and lists.
component_rules: Buttons must be sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). No pill shapes.
Inputs should look like architectural lines (border-b only).
Task items in the list should have hover effects: bg-secondary/50.
Use the 'accent' color (#FF4F00) ONLY for the primary 'Add Task' button and active toggle states.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or the noise texture.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use text-primary for headings and text-muted-foreground for secondary text.
